name: Rumprint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and granulated sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg, then stir in the vanilla extract and salt.
4. Gradually mix in the flour and nutmeg until the dough forms.
5. Shape the dough into small balls and place them on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
8. To prepare the filling, mix together rum, sugar, and any additional flavorings desired.
9. Spoon a small amount of filling into each cookie center.
10. Return cookies to oven for an additional 1-2 minutes until filling is melted and set.
11. Turn off the oven and let cookies cool on wire racks completely before serving.
